fault_hypothesis: On line 75, the filter condition uses `<= end` (inclusive) instead of `< end` (exclusive), causing points at the exact end boundary to be incorrectly included.

constraints.intent: Every returned point must have a timestamp strictly less than end (exclusive upper bound).

spec.expr: not any(p[0] == end for p in __cbfl_result)

constraints.intent: No point at exactly the end boundary should appear in the result.

spec.expr: all(p[0] < end for p in points if start <= p[0])

constraints.intent: Before end is used in the comprehension filter, confirm that only points strictly below end would satisfy the correct half-open condition.

spec.expr: all(start <= p[0] < end for p in __cbfl_result)

constraints.intent: All returned points must satisfy the half-open interval [start, end).
